recommendations.title: Chronicles of the Ghostly Tribe
recommendations.overview: In 1979, a young soldier is working in China's snowcapped mountains when an explosion reveals bizarre fossils hidden deep in the mountain caverns. What they discover next will change his life and human history forever.

recommendations.title: Phineas and Ferb The Movie: Across the 2nd Dimension
recommendations.genres: Animation, Comedy, Family, TV Movie, Science Fiction, Adventure, Action
recommendations.overview: Phineas and Ferb get trapped in an alternate dimension where the evil Doofenshmirtz rules the tri-state area. They must find a way back home with the help of their pet platypus named Perry, who they discover is a secret agent.

recommendations.title: Dog Man
recommendations.overview: When a faithful police dog and his human police officer owner are injured together on the job, a harebrained but life-saving surgery fuses the two of them together and Dog Man is born. Dog Man is sworn to protect and serve—and fetch, sit and roll ove

recommendations.title: Agent Cody Banks 2: Destination London
recommendations.overview: With all-new gadgets, high-flying action, exciting chases and a wisecracking new handler, Derek (Anthony Anderson), Cody has to retrieve the device before the world's leaders fall under the evil control of a diabolical villain.

recommendations.title: Paul Blart: Mall Cop
recommendations.overview: When a shopping mall is taken over by a gang of organized crooks, it's up to a mild-mannered security guard to save the day.

recommendations.title: A Dog's Journey
recommendations.overview: A dog finds the meaning of his own existence through the lives of the humans he meets.

recommendations.title: Déjà Vu
recommendations.overview: Called in to recover evidence in the aftermath of a horrific explosion on a New Orleans ferry, Federal agent Doug Carlin gets pulled away from the scene and taken to a top-secret government lab that uses a time-shifting surveillance device to help pr

recommendations.title: The Little Mermaid
recommendations.overview: A young reporter and his niece discover a beautiful and enchanting creature they believe to be the real little mermaid.

recommendations.title: Underdog
recommendations.genres: Family, Action, Adventure, Comedy, Fantasy, Science Fiction
recommendations.overview: A lab accident gives a beagle named Shoeshine some serious superpowers -- a secret that the dog eventually shares with the young boy who becomes his owner and friend.

recommendations.title: Princess Protection Program
recommendations.overview: When her nation is invaded, a young princess is taken into the Princess Protection Program. She is relocated to Louisiana, where she stays with a covert agent and his tomboyish daughter, and must learn how to behave like an ordinary teenager.
